checks.name: token-masking-and-raw-secret-state
checks.detail: Telegram token input now renders a masked preview in the TUI, keeps the raw secret in persisted state only, handles paste/backspace/navigation, and rejects @botname-style usernames as invalid token input.

checks.name: normalized-installer-outcome
checks.detail: Installer final-state rendering is normalized across success, success-with-warnings, recoverable failure, and fatal failure, without the previous contradictory complete-versus-fail combination.

checks.name: installer-native-validation-and-json-path
checks.detail: Warning-only Telegram lookup failures remain success-with-warnings, invalid or incomplete non-interactive input returns structured installer-native failures, and interactive ENTER-close behavior is covered.

checks.name: release-metadata-and-proof-bundle
checks.detail: Release metadata is aligned to 0.3.2, release validation passed, the proof bundle files are populated, and task validate reports Validation: ok.
